attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SOFRBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
,SOFRBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE                             
,SOFRBSA.DESCRIPTION                   
,SOFRBSA.END_DATE                      
,SOFRBSA.NAME                          
,SOFRBSA.ORG_ID                        
,SOFRBSA.START_DATE                    
,SOFRBSA.STATUS    
,SOFRBSA.CREATION_DATE                     
,SOFRBSA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                          
,SOFRBSA.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOFRBSA.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SOFRBSA  
WHERE NOT EXISTS
			(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE  SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SOFRBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
		AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SOFRBSA.ORG_ID ) 
	OR NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
                 WHERE SOFRBSA.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD')

SELECT
SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
,SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE             
,SORBSA.CREATION_DATE                 
,SORBSA.DESCRIPTION                   
,SORBSA.END_DATE                      
,SORBSA.NAME                          
,SORBSA.ORG_ID                        
,SORBSA.START_DATE                    
,SORBSA.STATUS                        
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                          
,SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SORBSA.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA   
WHERE NOT EXISTS
			(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE  SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
		AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID ) 
	OR NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
                 WHERE SORBSA.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD')

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID , SORBSA.ORG_ID ) + SMABSKEY.MAX_VAL AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
CAST(SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID AS BIGINT) AS  SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
CAST(SORBSA.ORG_ID AS BIGINT)	AS	SK_ORG_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 from $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SMABS  ) SMABSKEY,
 (SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,'OOD'  AS GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL  WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI') SORBSA
			   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
				ON ( NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SORBSA.ORG_ID AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD') 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  
				ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
			WHERE SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID )
				
UNION ALL

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SOFRBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID, SOFRBSA.ORG_ID) + SMABSKEY.MAX_VAL AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
SOFRBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID	SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
SOFRBSA.ORG_ID		SK_ORG_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 from $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SMABS  ) SMABSKEY,
 (SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL  
 UNION ALL
 SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,'OOD'  AS GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL  WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI') SOFRBSA
			   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
				ON ( NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SOFRBSA.ORG_ID AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD') 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  
				ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SOFRBSA.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
			WHERE SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SOFRBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SOFRBSA.ORG_ID )

SELECT
TVOUTPUT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,		
TVOUTPUT.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,	
TVOUTPUT.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, 
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CD,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ORG_ID_INT,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
	OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING),
	 DATE '3500-01-01') as END_TV_DT,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) as RANK_INDEX,
( CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY IS NOT NULL 
      THEN 'U'
      ELSE 'I' 
  END) as DML_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
		SELECT
		BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
		BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
		SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, 
		BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
		START_TV_DT,
                AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
                AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
		SS_CD,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
                SK_ORG_ID_INT,
		CREATE_DATETIME, 
		ACTION_CODE, 
		EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		ROW_NUMBER () OVER 
			( PARTITION BY  AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
			AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM  
		FROM	
		(	
		SELECT 			
			CAST(SORBSA.NAME AS VARCHAR(100)) AS BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			CAST(NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
			BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE VARCHAR(50)
			CAST(SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID AS BIGINT) AS  SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,			
			CAST(SORBSA.DESCRIPTION AS VARCHAR(240)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			CAST(SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE AS VARCHAR(30)) BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			CAST (SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (SORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (SORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			SORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			'OOD' as  SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			CAST(SORBSA.ORG_ID AS BIGINT) AS  SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			SORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM    (SEL * FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BATCH_SOURCE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1) SORBSA
					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = 'OOD'
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID )    
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
            ON SORBSA.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD'
		UNION ALL
			SELECT 
		    CAST(EXORBSA.NAME AS VARCHAR(100)) AS BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			CAST(NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
			CAST(EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID AS BIGINT) AS  SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			CAST(EXORBSA.DESCRIPTION AS VARCHAR(240)) AS  AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			CAST(EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE AS VARCHAR(30)) AS  BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,			
			CAST (EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (EXORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (EXORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			EXORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			'OOD' as  SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			EXORBSA.ORG_ID SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			EXORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM (SEL * FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BATCH_SOURCE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)  EXORBSA                           
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = 'OOD'
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=EXORBSA .ORG_ID)
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
            ON EXORBSA.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD'
		UNION ALL
			SELECT 
			NABST.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
			NABST.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
			NABST.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			NABST.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			NABST.START_TV_DT, 
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			NABST.SS_CD,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			NABST.SK_ORG_ID_INT	,			
			NABST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  CREATE_DATETIME, 
			'X' ACTION_CODE, 
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE_TV NABST,
			$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NABST.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND NABST.SS_CD='OOD'
			AND NABST.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
			AND (NABST.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,NABST.SK_ORG_ID_INT,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) in
			(
			SELECT CAST(SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID AS BIGINT) AS BATCH_SOURCE_ID ,CAST(SORBSA.ORG_ID AS BIGINT) AS ORG_ID ,'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA 
			UNION
			SELECT  CAST(EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID AS BIGINT) AS BATCH_SOURCE_ID ,CAST(EXORBSA.ORG_ID AS BIGINT) AS ORG_ID , 'OOD' as GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL EXORBSA
			where EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
			)
	) TVINPUT					
		QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, START_TV_DT
		ORDER	BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE_TV NABST
	ON	TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	AND	NABST.END_TV_DT =CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1	 


UNION ALL

SELECT
TVOUTPUT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,		
TVOUTPUT.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,	
TVOUTPUT.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, 
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CD,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ORG_ID_INT,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
	OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING),
	 DATE '3500-01-01') as END_TV_DT,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) as RANK_INDEX,
( CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY IS NOT NULL 
      THEN 'U'
      ELSE 'I' 
  END) as DML_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
		SELECT
		BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
		BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
		SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, 
		BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
		START_TV_DT,
                AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
                AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
		SS_CD,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
                SK_ORG_ID_INT,
		CREATE_DATETIME, 
		ACTION_CODE, 
		EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		ROW_NUMBER () OVER 
			( PARTITION BY  AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
			AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM  
		FROM	
		(	
		
			SELECT 
			SORBSA.NAME    BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD  ,
			SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			SORBSA.DESCRIPTION AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			CAST (SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (SORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (SORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			SORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			'OOD' as  SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			SORBSA.ORG_ID SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			SORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM    (SEL * FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BATCH_SOURCE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1) SORBSA
					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = 'OOD'
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID )    
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
            ON SORBSA.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD'
		UNION ALL
			SELECT 
		    EXORBSA.NAME   BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD  ,
			EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			EXORBSA.DESCRIPTION AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			CAST (EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (EXORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (EXORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			EXORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			'OOD' as  SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			EXORBSA.ORG_ID SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			EXORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM (SEL * FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BATCH_SOURCE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)  EXORBSA                           
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = 'OOD'
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=EXORBSA .ORG_ID)
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
            ON EXORBSA.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD'
		UNION ALL
			SELECT 
			NABST.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
			NABST.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
			NABST.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			NABST.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			NABST.START_TV_DT, 
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			NABST.SS_CD,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			NABST.SK_ORG_ID_INT	,			
			NABST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  CREATE_DATETIME, 
			'X' ACTION_CODE, 
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE_TV NABST,
			$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NABST.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND NABST.SS_CD='OOD'
			AND NABST.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
			AND (NABST.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,NABST.SK_ORG_ID_INT,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) in
			(
			SELECT SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,SORBSA.ORG_ID,'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA 
			UNION
			SELECT EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,EXORBSA.ORG_ID, 'OOD' as GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL EXORBSA
			where EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
			)
	) TVINPUT					
		QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, START_TV_DT
		ORDER	BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE_TV NABST
	ON	TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	AND	NABST.END_TV_DT =CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
